-------------SPELLS SPELLS SPELLS SPELLS SPELLS-------------
?????\nUnlock: Do something silly and funny
DEBUG
Press $0 to pick 'DEBUG'\n'WOW!'
Endear
A standard, slow projectile
Press $0 to pick 'Endear'\n'Simple bits of affection will work on anyone.'
Dote
A burst of two short-range projectiles
Press $0 to pick 'Dote'\n'Melt their heart with special attention.'
Allure
A fast and pulling long-range projectile
Press $0 to pick 'Allure'\n'Draw them in with just a glance.'
Confidence
A strong, heavy projectile
Press $0 to pick 'Confidence'\n'Don't make your CRUSH chase after you.'
Dazzle
A powerful explosive projectile with massive recoil
Press $0 to pick 'Dazzle'\n'Be dramatic! Blow your CRUSH away!'
Candor
Three slow drilling projectiles, shot behind your back
Press $0 to pick 'Candor'\n'Open and honest.'
Geek Out
A speedy projectile that gains +75% damage each time it bounces
Press $0 to pick 'Geek Out'\n'Complex, but worth it?'
Foresight
A floaty projectile that gains +200% damage over time
Press $0 to pick 'Foresight'\n'Plan carefully and be rewarded.'
Intuition
An slow projectile that jumps forward after a moment
Press $0 to pick 'Intuition'\n'Read between the lines.'
One-Liner
A high-knockback projectile that cannot turn
Press $0 to pick 'One-Liner'\n'Straight-shot, no-nonsense. Careful.'
Pickup Line
A decelerating projectile with high recoil and negative gravity
Press $0 to pick 'Pickup Line'\n'If subtlety won't get you far... try being direct!'
Icebreaker
Three short-range drilling projectiles that converge to a point
Press $0 to pick 'Icebreaker'\n'Use a simple joke to take your CRUSH's guard down.'
Stumble
A weak projectile with no special properties
Press $0 to pick 'Stumble'\n'Mistakes can be endearing, if nothing else...'
Inside Joke
A harmless bumper that sends projectiles towards your CRUSH's heart
Press $0 to pick 'Inside Joke'\n'Setup and punchline...'
Tidbits
A straight-shot of three projectiles with different speeds
Press $0 to pick 'Tidbits'\n'Never disregard the little details that make you unique.'
Play It Straight
Causes COMEDIC projectiles to no longer heal or cause self-damage
Press $0 to pick 'Play It Straight'\n'The best pranksters know when to get serious.'
Under Pressure
Boosts a projectile's CHARMING damage and initial speed based on the TEMPO
Press $0 to pick 'Under Pressure'\n'Keep giving love that one more chance...'
Cherish
Increases the damaging radius of a projectile
Press $0 to pick 'Cherish'\n'Open your arms even wider! Can't sidestep this love!'
Snapshot
A projectile will swap places with you right before you take damage
Press $0 to pick 'Snapshot'\n'The best moments are fleeting... So take lots of pictures.'
Adorable Glance
Boosts the CUTE damage of a projectile by 50%
Press $0 to pick 'Adorable Glance'\n'A look that'll make them adore you...'
Fetching Glance
Boosts the CHARMING damage of a projectile by 50%
Press $0 to pick 'Fetching Glance'\n'A look that'll make them swoon for you...'
Witty Glance
Boosts the CLEVER damage of a projectile by 50%
Press $0 to pick 'Witty Glance'\n'A look that'll make them admire you...'
Humorous Glance
Boosts the COMEDIC damage of a projectile by 50%
Press $0 to pick 'Humorous Glance'\n'A look that'll make them laugh...'
Mysterious Glance
Boosts a random damage type of a projectile by 100%
Press $0 to pick 'Mysterious Glance'\n'A look that'll keep them on their toes...'
Double Down
Acts as a copy of the next (other) modifier on this wand
Press $0 to pick 'Double Down'\n'Commit to it until they swoon.'
Triple Down
Acts as two copies of the next (other) modifier on this wand
Press $0 to pick 'Triple Down'\n'What's smarter than doing a good thing twice?'
Flaunt
Creates a blast of glitter on a projectile's first two bounces
Press $0 to pick 'Flaunt'\n'Strut your stuff!'
Kindle
Converts half of a projectile's highest damage type into flame
Press $0 to pick 'Kindle'\n'Light a fire in their heart.'
Poke
Causes a projectile to accelerate and gain CHARMING damage once at a distance
Press $0 to pick 'Poke'\n'Initiative is attractive.'
Embrace
A field that holds and launches your other projectiles
Press $0 to pick 'Embrace'\n'It's holding on tight.'
Allegro
Boosts a projectile's initial speed, but decreases its lifetime
Press $0 to pick 'Allegro'\n'Briskly.'
Adagio
Boosts a projectile's lifetime, but decreases its initial speed
Press $0 to pick 'Adagio'\n'Leisurely.'
Gut-Buster
Balances the knockback and COMEDIC damage of a projectile
Press $0 to pick 'Gut-Buster'\n'This one hits hard.'
Heart-Piercer
Grants piercing to a projectile, but divides its damage and knockback by 6
Press $0 to pick 'Heart-Piercer'\n'That sweet spot.'
SUPERAFFECTIONATE
A slow projectile that mimics your movement and shoots alongside you
Press $0 to pick 'SUPERAFFECTIONATE'\n'A heart that's full to bursting!!!'
THE LOOK
A gazing eye that points in your wand direction and overcharges damage multipliers
Press $0 to pick 'THE LOOK'\n'We've all used it.'
HYPERFOCUS
A bouncy and kickable orb that captures TEMPO until it bursts
Press $0 to pick 'HYPERFOCUS'\n'Keep your concentration, and the good times may never pass...'
ALL-TIMER
A dangerous self-homing disc that permanently steals your CRUSH's max health on hit
Press $0 to pick 'ALL-TIMER'\n'A legendary joke, unforgettable... if you don't screw it up.'
Curveball
Increases a projectile's COMEDIC damage and grants it a wiggly path
Press $0 to pick 'Curveball'\n'Keep that punchline a secret... misdirect until it's ready!'
Punchline
Causes a projectile to charge with COMEDIC damage if you hold the fire button
Press $0 to pick 'Punchline'\n'Wait for it... wait for it... now!'
Sequitur
Causes a projectile to wrap and mimic a bounce at the edge of the arena
Press $0 to pick 'Sequitur'\n'Keep the conversation flowing with leads and tidbits.'
Entice
Causes a projectile to attract nearby projectiles once it expires
Press $0 to pick 'Entice'\n'Pull 'em in for more...'
Repartee
Lowers a projectile's speed, but allows it to break your CRUSH's projectiles on contact
Press $0 to pick 'Repartee'\n'Knowing just what to say... A conversational counterattack.'
Ad-Lib
Grants a projectile a small chance to convert terrain into a powerful COMEDIC missile
Press $0 to pick 'Ad-Lib'\n'Fashion your comedic material out of anything.'
Pop-up
Halves a projectile's lifetime, but teleports you to it when it expires
Press $0 to pick 'Pop-up'\n'You're a pleasant surprise!'
Overthink
Increases a projectile's CLEVER damage for every LuaComponent it has
Press $0 to pick 'Overthink'\n'It might make you seem smart. Or silly.'
Fervour
A red-hot piercing fan that applies flame without damaging
Press $0 to pick 'Fervour'\n'Pure, unfiltered passion. May cause burns.'
Big-Hearted
Grants +25 extra max HP
Press $0 to pick 'Big-Hearted'\n'I like you thiiiiis much!'
Clingy
Grants a 50% chance to salvage each spell you bring into this encounter
Press $0 to pick 'Clingy'\n'Hold on tight... don't let go!'
Slick
Grants +35% horizontal movement speed, with slight slipperiness
Press $0 to pick 'Slick'\n'Think fast, and don't slip up!'
Warm
Grants +20% fire damage and ignites every third projectile you fire
Press $0 to pick 'Warm'\n'Like a heated blanket. Also, a fire hazard?'
Slapstick
Causes you to release a blast of glitter upon taking damage
Press $0 to pick 'Slapstick'\n'Taking damage? It's all part of the show!'
Cadence
Slowly regenerates your health relative to the current TEMPO
Press $0 to pick 'Cadence'\n'Listen to their heartbeat and be soothed.'
Bide
Every tenth projectile you fire will deal critical damage
Press $0 to pick 'Bide'\n'Let them know how you feel. Eventually.'
Hindsight
Copies every (other) passive spell you have equipped, but slowly drains your HP
Press $0 to pick 'Hindsight'\n'The past can hurt. But you need to learn from it!'
Commit
Increases both the healing and self-damage of COMEDIC projectiles by 50%
Press $0 to pick 'Commit'\n'To the bit.'
Tease
A strange projectile that creates a bonus heart for you to hit
Press $0 to pick 'Tease'\n'Fluster them to break their guard!'
Puppy-Dog Eyes
Grants projectile repulsion relative to how much damage you've taken recently
Press $0 to pick 'Puppy-Dog Eyes'\n'With a pout - irresistable.'
Glomp
A short-ranged lunging projectile
Press $0 to pick 'Glomp'\n'Look it up.'
Avow
A fast piercing wave that grows larger along its path
Press $0 to pick 'Avow'\n'Shout your love from the rooftops, if you must.'
Showstopper
Constantly produces and allows you to control glitter. Activate to switch type
Press $0 to pick 'Showstopper'\n'The stage, the show, all at your fingertips...'
Farce
Grants a projectile many powerful bounces, but each bounce subtracts some lifetime
Press $0 to pick 'Farce'\n'Complete absurdism, it's off-the-wall!'
Adrenaline
Charges up at low HP, then adds CHARMING damage to all of your projectiles
Press $0 to pick 'Adrenaline'\n'Heart-pounding thrill! Just don't overdo it...'
Bang!
A lobbed explosive that releases glitter without direct damage
Press $0 to pick 'Bang!'\n'Explosive laughter, taken literally.'
Love Letter
A drifting projectile that tries again with halved damage if it misses
Press $0 to pick 'Love Letter'\n'Missing your pen pal...? Not a chance!'
Nuzzle
While near your CRUSH's heart, deals constant CUTE damage and attracts your projectiles
Press $0 to pick 'Nuzzle'\n'Closeness isn't just for cats.'
Simplicity
Limits a projectile's initial angle. Activate to limit further with higher damage
Press $0 to pick 'Simplicity'\n'Finding pleasure in the little things is clever, too.'
Metronome
A random projectile
Press $0 to pick 'Metronome'\n'Keep up the pace.'
Sugar
A delayed triple-shot of random sugary sweets
Press $0 to pick 'Sugar'\n'Sickeningly sweet.'
Spice
A projectile will deal its damage again in a radius after a short delay
Press $0 to pick 'Spice'\n'An emotional aftertaste.'
Breather
Stun both you and your CRUSH for five seconds
Press $0 to pick 'Breather'\n'Good for the mind and the soul.'
Breeze
Lightly push all projectiles in your current wand direction for ten seconds
Press $0 to pick 'Breeze'\n'Look towards the wind and strike a pose.'
Butterflies
Allows levitating while your energy is empty, at the cost of HP
Press $0 to pick 'Butterflies'\n'Feels like I'm floating...'
Smite
Causes a projectile to travel its entire path instantly, but without special properties
Press $0 to pick 'Smite'\n'Smitten, not smote.'
Callback
A fast-travelling, penetrating projectile that returns to you
Press $0 to pick 'Callback'\n'You might forget it, but it won't forget you.'
Ephemeral
Sets a projectile's lifetime to twice its total damage
Press $0 to pick 'Ephemeral'\n'A brief spark that hits hard.'
Friendliness
Create a bouncy bubble that breaks hostile projectiles
Press $0 to pick 'Friendliness'\n'A way to disarm another!'
Anonymize
Causes a projectile to forget who shot it
Press $0 to pick 'Anonymize'\n'From your secret admirer...'
Slow-Burn
Fires a COMEDIC missile when you jump with proper timing
Press $0 to pick 'Slow-burn'\n'Romance and jokes... both require... time.'
Ardor
A burst of eight projectiles in every direction
Press $0 to pick 'Ardor'\n'Versatile and relentless.'
Turnabout
Inverts a projectile's gravity and reduces its air friction
Press $0 to pick 'Turnabout'\n'Heel-turn... pow!'
Fluff
A piercing projectile that orbits you and reduces incoming damage by 25%
Press $0 to pick 'Fluff'\n'Nothing wrong with the feel-good.'
Bond
Create a portal that transports projectiles once it finds its pair
Press $0 to pick 'Bond'\n'It endures, no matter the distance.'
Checkmate
Grants a projectile a small chance to inflict a micro-stun on your CRUSH
Press $0 to pick 'Checkmate'\n'Pinned! Now accept my love!'
Quipster
Grants +25 max mana and +3/s mana regen
Press $0 to pick 'Quipster'\n'Practically infinite practical jokes.'
Take Five
Greatly reduce all incoming damage briefly. Refunds a charge when successful
Press $0 to pick 'Take Five'\n'Not quite five minutes.'
Whispers
Causes a projectile to constantly fire weak bullets towards your CRUSH's heart
Press $0 to pick 'Whispers'\n'Subtle, but watch that heart jump when you try it.'
QUADRUPLE DOWN
Acts as three copies of the next (other) modifier on this wand
Press $0 to pick 'QUADRUPLE DOWN'\n'Absurdism.'
-------------ITEMS ITEMS ITEMS ITEMS ITEMS ITEMS-------------
Sealed Letter
A formal invitation to the First Party.
Kiuaskivi
It glows with heat.\nPerhaps someone is fond of it.
Ukkoskivi
It thrums with electrical charge.\nPerhaps someone is fond of it.
Vuoksikivi
It pulses with a strong current.\nAllows diving into deep waters.
Tannerkivi
It doesn't react to any stimulus.\n
Kakkakikkare
Just holding this stone makes your stomach turn.\nCauses extreme disgust when used in an encounter.
Refreshing Gourd
Perpetually perfectly ripe.\nGrants regeneration when used in an encounter.
Rooftop Key
Allows access to the roof of the Hiisi Apartments.\nHas no effect in an encounter.
Medical Key
Allows access to the office in the Hiisi Apartments.\nHas no effect in an encounter.
Skull Key
Allows access to the Graveyard.\nHas no effect in an encounter.
Shroombrella
Protects from rain and shine.\nBlocks projectiles when used in an encounter.
Pea
Disturber of a sleeping magician.
-------------AMULETS AMULETS AMULETS AMULETS AMULETS-------------
Golden Amulet
A necklace and amulet. The golden sheen is comfortable and familiar.\nGain 2% CHARGE each second.\nA small item could fit in the compartment inside.
Diamond Amulet
A necklace and amulet. The diamond shines brightly when angled towards light.\nGain 1% CHARGE multiplied by the current TEMPO each second.\nA small item could fit in the compartment inside.
Emerald Amulet
A necklace and amulet. The emerald color brings out fond memories.\nAvoid damage for 10 seconds to gain 30% CHARGE.\nA small item could fit in the compartment inside.
Copper Amulet
A necklace and amulet. The smell of the copper reminds you of old bloodshed...\nGain 8% CHARGE for every 5 damage you take.\nA small item could fit in the compartment inside.
Brass Amulet
A necklace and amulet. The aged brass is reminiscent of bullet casings...\nGain 5% CHARGE for every 20 damage your CRUSH takes.\nA small item could fit in the compartment inside.
Silver Amulet
A necklace and amulet. The sharpened silver could cut you, if you were careless.\nGraze close to 5 projectiles to gain 20% CHARGE.\nA small item could fit in the compartment inside.
Fool's Gold Amulet
A necklace and amulet. The golden surface is polished and clean, but has an odd smell...\nEvery 5 seconds, gain some CHARGE?\nA small item could fit in the compartment inside.
Lightgem Amulet

A necklace and amulet. The luminous surface provides a powerful warmth against your chest.\nStart encounters with 500% CHARGE, but never gain any more.\nA small item could fit in the compartment inside.
Darkgem Amulet
A necklace and amulet. The pitch-black surface lets no light escape from its surface.\nStart encounters with -500% CHARGE, and gain 10% each second.\nA small item could fit in the compartment inside.
Amulet of Yendor
A necklace and amulet. The glassy mithril surface feels like it may last forever...\nEvery 5 seconds, gain 15% CHARGE and lose 1 health.\nA small item could fit in the compartment inside.
Amulet of Yendor
A necklace and amulet. The mithril surface feels a little less reflective than usual.\nEvery 5 seconds, gain 15% CHARGE and lose 1 health.\nA small item could fit in the compartment inside.
Memento: Parry

A small, foul-smelling ball of meat. Channels defense as offense.\nPress [KICK] to spend $0% CHARGE and initiate a PARRY.\nReflect nearby hostile projectiles for a brief moment as powerful homing attacks.
Memento: Focus

A chunk of soft green flesh. Possesses regenerative capabilities.\nPress [KICK] to spend $0% CHARGE and initiate FOCUS.\nBecome immobile until the FOCUS is complete to regenerate a portion of your max health.
Memento: Plasma

A red LED light, everlasting. Grants an attack of pure energy.\nPress [KICK] to spend up to $0% CHARGE and initiate PLASMA.\nFire a devastating plasma beam from your wand until you take damage or [KICK] again.
Memento: Dash
A delicately carved stone egg. Heightens control of one's own body.\nPress [KICK] to spend $0% CHARGE and initiate a DASH.\nMove swiftly for a short period of time and take reduced damage.
Memento: Slowdown

A blue iridescent scale. Causes feelings of patience and tranquility.\nPress [KICK] to spend up to $0% CHARGE and initiate SLOWDOWN.\nSlow all nearby projectiles for a time, healing upon successful grazes.
Memento: Berserk
A tuft of sheep's wool. Brings memories of gain and loss.\nPress [KICK] to spend $0% CHARGE and initiate BERSERK.\nFire your wands rapidly and uncontrollably, but stillness drains your health.
Memento: Linkage

A shard of the Sauvan Ydin. Amplifies connections of all kinds.\nPress [KICK] to spend $0% CHARGE and initiate LINKAGE.\nChain yourself to your CRUSH's heart, increasing their damage multipliers over time.
